svg.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, 'Courier New', 'Malgun Gothic', monospace
svg.title: Hoijun Kim - biosignal and edge-AI researcher
svg.desc: A dark laboratory oscilloscope reading four looping biosignal channels - three forearm EMG channels (FDS, EDC, APB) and one video pose channel - with a sweeping scan bar and a prosthetic gripper that flexes in response, representing muscle signals decoded into motion.
svg.text: biosignal ML researcher / decoding muscle signals into motion
20 mV/div 500 ms/div fs 2 kHz TRIG auto
